mapper.select: select survey_description AS tesci_description, survey_url AS tesci_url, survey_name AS tesci_name, year AS tesci_year FROM survey WHERE year = #{s_year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey(survey_url, survey_name, year) VALUES (#{survey_url}, #{survey_name}, #{year})
mapper.select: SELECT jsonData, s.top_menu_list_jsonData FROM page_survey ps JSON survey s ON survey_id = survey_id WHERE s.survey_url = #{sType} AND ps.sPage = #{sPage}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO page_survey(sPage, jsonData, survey_id) VALUES(#{sPage}, #{surveyInfo.jsonData}, #{surveyInfo.survey_id})
